[ Computer Science Notes ]

Computer Science Notes

Five entry points into my work: AI research reading, selected projects, technical writing, current collaboration asks, and searchable CS notes.

ResearchProjectsWritingAsksNotes

/ Research

Paper-backed AI research notes.

Reading trails and essays that connect papers to mechanisms: interpretability, model evaluation, deep learning, memory, routing, and agent reliability.

Read research trail

/ Projects

Selected systems with evidence.

Software and AI projects shown with problem, method, result, code links, write-ups, status, and tradeoffs.

View projects

/ Writing

Essays about technical ideas.

Longer-form writing on deep learning, algorithms, project lessons, and the process behind building technical systems.

Read writing

/ Asks

Open routes for specific conversations.

Contact me about research, AI engineering internships, consulting prototypes, or NUS AI Society speakers, workshops, sponsors, and partnerships.

Contact me

/ Notes

Searchable computer science notes.

Topic archives pulled from my study system, organized by topic and subpage across algorithms, systems, AI engineering, software engineering, and agentic coding.

Browse notes

/ Discovery

Static notes, RSS, and source trails for rigorous computer science reading.
